id: sacket
title: Sacket - Ticketing Website

description.en: Full-stack Laravel ticketing platform covering event management, booking flow, role-based access, QR ticket validation, and payment integration.
description.id: Platform ticketing full-stack berbasis Laravel untuk manajemen event, alur booking, akses berbasis role, validasi tiket QR, dan integrasi pembayaran.

en: End-to-end Laravel development
Event, ticket, promo, and order management
Multi-step booking and payment flow
Midtrans payment gateway integration
id: Pengembangan end-to-end menggunakan Laravel
Manajemen event, tiket, promo, dan pesanan
Alur booking dan pembayaran multi-step
Integrasi payment gateway Midtrans

scope.en: Booking flow, admin panel, roles, QR tickets, and payment
scope.id: Booking flow, admin panel, role, tiket QR, dan pembayaran

status.en: Source code, public demo reopening planned
status.id: Source code, demo publik akan dibuka ulang

id: dibelajarin-laravel
title: Dibelajarin - Learning Management System

description.en: Laravel-based LMS with Filament admin tooling, authentication, relational data design, and learning progress logic.
description.id: LMS berbasis Laravel dengan admin panel Filament, autentikasi, desain database relasional, dan logic progress belajar.

en: Laravel Breeze authentication
Filament admin panel for data management
Relational database design for LMS features
Custom learning progress and role-based flows
id: Autentikasi menggunakan Laravel Breeze
Panel admin Filament untuk manajemen data
Desain database relasional untuk fitur LMS
Logic custom untuk progress belajar dan role user

scope.en: Laravel backend, Filament admin, auth, and LMS data model
scope.id: Backend Laravel, admin Filament, auth, dan model data LMS

status.en: Source code, public demo reopening planned
status.id: Source code, demo publik akan dibuka ulang

id: dibelajarin-mern
title: DiBelajar.in - Learning Management System

description.en: Full-stack MERN learning platform with a Node.js API, MongoDB data model, and React frontend for role-based learning experiences.
description.id: Platform LMS full-stack MERN dengan API Node.js, model data MongoDB, dan frontend React untuk pengalaman belajar berbasis role.

en: Node.js and Express API for authentication, courses, and progress
MongoDB data modeling for LMS entities
React frontend with role-based dashboards and protected routes
Course, material, assignment, discussion, and notification flows
id: API Node.js dan Express untuk autentikasi, kursus, dan progress
Pemodelan data MongoDB untuk kebutuhan LMS
Frontend React dengan dashboard berbasis role dan protected routes
Alur kursus, materi, tugas, diskusi, dan notifikasi

scope.en: Auth, API, database, course flow, and frontend integration
scope.id: Auth, API, database, alur kursus, dan integrasi frontend

id: frevan
title: Frevan - E-commerce Store

description.en: Full-stack e-commerce project with a secure Node.js backend and React storefront for product browsing, cart, and checkout flows.
description.id: Project e-commerce full-stack dengan backend Node.js yang aman dan storefront React untuk alur produk, keranjang, dan checkout.

en: Secure REST API with JWT authentication
Cart and checkout business logic
React storefront built with Vite and Redux Toolkit
MongoDB data management for products and users
id: REST API aman dengan autentikasi JWT
Logic bisnis untuk keranjang dan checkout
Storefront React menggunakan Vite dan Redux Toolkit
Manajemen data MongoDB untuk produk dan user

scope.en: REST API, product CRUD, cart, checkout, and React storefront
scope.id: REST API, CRUD produk, cart, checkout, dan storefront React

id: swapskill
title: SwapSkill - Student Skill Barter Platform

description.en: Full-stack skill-barter platform for students, combining a Laravel API with a Next.js frontend for discovery, offers, profiles, and reviews.
description.id: Platform barter skill full-stack untuk mahasiswa, menggabungkan API Laravel dan frontend Next.js untuk discovery, tawaran, profil, dan review.

en: Token authentication with Laravel Sanctum
Skill board, barter offers, bookmarks, and reviews
Next.js frontend with profile, settings, and notification UI
Filament admin panel and pragmatic clean architecture
id: Autentikasi token menggunakan Laravel Sanctum
Skill board, tawaran barter, bookmark, dan review
Frontend Next.js dengan UI profil, settings, dan notifikasi
Panel admin Filament dan clean architecture pragmatis

scope.en: Skill board, profile, offer, review, notification, and admin flows
scope.id: Skill board, profil, tawaran, review, notifikasi, dan admin

status.en: Source code, public demo reopening planned
status.id: Source code, demo publik akan dibuka ulang

id: bi-dom
title: BI-DOM - Full-Stack Web App

description.en: Full-stack BI-DOM project combining a Laravel backend with a Next.js frontend for a database-driven application workflow.
description.id: Project BI-DOM full-stack yang menggabungkan backend Laravel dan frontend Next.js untuk alur aplikasi berbasis database.

en: Laravel backend foundation for application data and business flow
Next.js frontend structure for user-facing workflows
Database-oriented application architecture
Separated backend and frontend repositories for full-stack integration
id: Fondasi backend Laravel untuk data aplikasi dan business flow
Struktur frontend Next.js untuk workflow user-facing
Arsitektur aplikasi berbasis database
Repository backend dan frontend terpisah untuk integrasi full-stack

scope.en: Laravel backend, Next.js frontend, database flow, and full-stack integration
scope.id: Backend Laravel, frontend Next.js, alur database, dan integrasi full-stack

status.en: Source code, public demo reopening planned
status.id: Source code, demo publik akan dibuka ulang
